title: 皐月賞の後に・挫折もまた良し！

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Woe is me... A tragic defeat! However, setbacks
are the essence of a good story. The mighty foe
will have their just desserts at the next
engagement.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I've realized this loss owes to my being a merciful
king. The compassion I feel for others is too
great. I repent this passivity and look to seize my
generation's throne.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I advance my pieces onward to the
Japanese Derby, a fitting venue to further bolster
my name!
